case_title: TRACY JOHNSON VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,243.39 FILED BY JOHNSON, TRACY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.
